# Changelog

## [1.1.2]

* Bump dependencies versions
* Added no-op support for web builds

## [1.1.0]

* Increase big version to avoid pjsip errors

## [1.0.2]

* Fixed missing freezed generated files

## [1.0.1]

* Added pub info
* Removed not-necessary example from Rust

## [1.0.0]

* Initial release with minimum functionality
* Minimal Android support
* Registeration and call update streams
